backbone_policy.lora: supported but must expose only LoRA/adapter backbone parameters as trainable

contents: LoRA or adapter parameters when enabled
checkpoint_policy.m2_artifact: separate small ridge state fitted only on the outer-training side

claim_boundary: Sequence approximation of independent dual-receptor computational Docking geometry; not binding probability, affinity, experimental competition, blocking, Docking Gold, or final submission evidence.

contact_supervision.aggregation: maximum pose-weighted residue-pair frequency over PVRIG positions for each VHH residue and receptor
contact_supervision.technical_incomplete_policy: no contact target; never convert to zero or negative

model.base: explicit externally cross-fitted M2 three-target prediction
model.pooling: global plus receptor-specific contact-weighted residue pooling
model.prediction: M2 base plus bounded tanh residual

nested_evaluation.epoch_selection: one whole-parent inner fold inside each outer-training side
nested_evaluation.final_fit: refit from scratch on all outer-training parents for the selected epoch count
nested_evaluation.outer_test: evaluated exactly once after inner selection and final refit

target: R_dual_min with auxiliary R_8X6B and R_9E6Y
